Traditionally, Alantsilodendron has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, with its health benefits reportedly including anti-inflammatory, antimalarial, and antimicrobial properties, as well as the potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The bioactive constituents of Alantsilodendron include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
